data.body:
REMEDIATION session (follow-on to the e6d9 plan-review dry run).

PART A — corrected #4 (undefined "parity") in the workflow-engine-v2 epic:
- Child 7d58 AC: replaced "shows parity on the corpuses" with a DEFINED PARITY BAR = NON-INFERIORITY (not byte-identity, since LLM outputs make exact equality incoherent): on the standing eval corpus (DSO+snap+rebar), same model+decoding, N>=3 repeats: (a) structured-output validity v2>=v1 (>=99% valid, no regression); (b) per-criterion verdict agreement >=95% AND zero decision-level flips on the gold set; (c) recall & false-accept within +/-2pp of v1 (paired non-inferiority); (d) error/timeout v2<=v1; (e) cost/latency informational. The LangGraph drop (d6d1) is blocked until met.
- Epic e6d9 runtime AC now references that bar. check-ac/clarity still pass on both.

PART B — encoded the tool-access design principle into the plan-review gate (5fd2), per directive: "needing the broader ticket dependency graph is a signal the criterion should be AGENT-tier; tool access always includes rebar + filesystem; and that access also grants any referenced artifacts/analysis."
- 5fd2 epic: added a "Design clarification — AGENT-tier tool-access contract + dep-graph-need => agent-tier" section. ROUTING RULE: dep-graph / cross-ticket / cross-artifact need => AGENT (not single-turn fed-context; a snapshot is incomplete). AGENT TOOL CONTRACT (always): rebar (show/list/deps/ready/next_batch/links/children = LIVE graph) + filesystem; together they reach any referenced artifact (linked session logs/tickets via rebar; docs/experiments/research via read_file/glob).
- criteria_v8.json: G3 (child coverage) and G4 (child consistency) reclassified 1-TURN -> AGENT with context_needs="live dep graph via rebar+fs". Reverses the earlier "fed as context" correction (dry run proved fed context incomplete: the gate flagged a 'missing sequencing edge' that exists as 8d8e depends_on dbc6).
- check_registry_coverage.py: AGENT_TIER += G3,G4 (guard still PASS, 23/23). three_pass.py: CODEBASE_GROUNDED += G3,G4 (tool-grounded Pass-2). exp2_agentic.py: added a read-only `rebar` tool (show/list/deps/ready/next-batch/search) to the agent tool set + handler + system-prompt contract; tools now = grep/read_file/glob/rebar/submit_review.

VALIDATION: re-ran G4/G3 finders on e6d9 with the rebar tool to confirm the agent reads the live graph and drops the missing-edge FP (see validate_rebar_tool.log). Root cause of the original FPs (Burr missing-edge, #3 migration, partial G3/G4): reviewer had ticket text + repo grep but not the live dep graph — now fixed by the contract.

NOTE: changes are in the design epic + criteria registry + experiment harness (scaffolding). The production implementation under src/rebar still follows 5fd2; this records the design decision and makes the dry-run harness honor it.
